variants.label: recommended
variants.text: Sixty builders showed up for the Acme Cosmos beta this weekend and every single one of them shipped a working demo that anyone can open in a browser without any setup at all, and we spent the whole three days watching links go live one after another until the room was full of things you could actually click and try yourself today.

variants.label: variant-a
variants.text: Sixty builders showed up and every single demo went out as a usable link people can open here.

variants.label: variant-b
variants.text: We asked for working demos. Sixty arrived. Here is the complete weekend project recap for all.
